title: Java Virtual Threads
description: Practice creating and joining a Java virtual thread.

choices: A started virtual Thread running the lambda
A Thread.Builder you must start later
Compilation fails because virtual threads need a pool
completionChecks.explanation: Thread.ofVirtual().start(runnable) creates and starts a lightweight virtual thread and returns the Thread; ofVirtual() on its own returns the builder.

completionChecks.prompt: What kind of thread does Thread.ofVirtual().start create?
choices: A thread pool without starting work
An OS thread bound one-to-one for its whole life
completionChecks.explanation: Thread.ofVirtual() builds lightweight virtual threads that the JVM schedules onto a small pool of carrier threads, not one OS thread each.

completionChecks.prompt: What does this code print before worker.join() returns?
choices: Nothing, because join cancels the worker
Compilation fails because join is unavailable on virtual threads
completionChecks.explanation: The virtual thread runs the lambda body, and join waits for that work to finish before the current thread continues.
